RB-47 Radar-Visual Case

Multiple military witnesses and instrument returns

Military Engagements

radar, aircraft

Date: July 17, 1957

Location: Mississippi, United States

Witness Type: Military aircrew

Witness Count: 6

Summary

An RB-47 crew reported a luminous object tracked visually and by electronic systems.

Scores

Case Score: 91

Witness Quality Score: 86

Evidence Quality Score: 94

Effects Present

Sub-effect: Multi-sensor detection. Instrumental / Sensing Data: 95. Visual Records: 40. Reports / Investigations: 90. Witness Quantity: 80. Event Conditions: 85. Credibility / Reliability: 95. Probative Factor: 4. Sources: Condon Report.

Government Investigation

The case was discussed in a government-sponsored investigation.

Sources

Condon Report, 1969. Includes discussion of the RB-47 incident.
